title: Vaanam Lyrics Power Paandi
stanzas: <div>Vaanam Song Lyrics Power Paandi

Vaanam parandhu
paarka yaengum
pookkal siragai neettudhaa

oadum nadhiyinile oadam
oindhu karaiyai thaeduthaa

endrum ivanum kuzhandhaiyaa.
vaarthai innum mazhalaiyaa.
sirippil idhayam ponguthe
karunai sindhuthe.

kaatru mazhaiyil modhalaam
andha kadalil saeralaam
indha kuzhandhai koottathil
ivanum thendralae.

mannaadhi mannaa
veeraadhi veeraa
engal nanbaa.. paandi.

vilaiyaadum singam
vilaiyillaa thangam
engal nanbaa
power paandi.

pudhiya Vaanam parandhu
paarka yaengum
pookkal siragai neettudhaa

Vazhaikaiye endrume
edhayo thaedum payanam

yaeno oadinom
eththanai kanavu.
oaindhu poi saaivadhu

idhuthana sugamaa
kadavulin varamaa

thaayum illai
thaaramum illai.
maganin magalae
nee oadi vaa.

tholil ondru
madiyil ondru unarndhaal
mattum puriyum
uyir mattum
idhu podhum.

Vaanam parandhu
paarka yaengum
pookkal siragai neettudhaa

oadum nadhiyinile oadam
oindhu karaiyai thaeduthaa

engal nanbaa.. paandi.

vilaiyaadum singam

engal nanbaa
power paandi.

pudhiya Vaanam parandhu
paarka yaengum
pookkal siragai neettudhaa

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

pala kuyilu koovudhu
oru mayilu aaduthu

thaedi vandhu
powder poosuthu..

oru kadhavu thorakkuthu
pudhu vazhigal porakkudhu
vayasaana singam
jeans pottu dance aaduthu

ada naadi thudikkudhu
pudhu vegam porakkudhu
ada palaiya raththam
paththi eriyudhu
kodhikkuthu.

Oru soora kaaththu
oora paaththu poguthu.
manasellaam pooththu
vaanam paaththu yaerudhu

Oor ulagam
kaaladiyilthaan adanguthu.
paer sollida
poar muzhakkam thaan
muzhanguthu.

kaagangalum
megangalum
keela parakkudhu
vinveliyil ennudaiya
face theriyudhu.

ini baarangal ellaam
en baaram thaangum.
nana podum
thaazhathuk ellaam aadum.

idhuthaanda sorgam
adhu ippo en pakkam.
naan pona pinnal
en paer nikkum

andha STARum naanda
andha SUNum naandaa
andha SUNoda vinnum naandaa
odhungudaa

kaaththu kaaththu
enna paaththu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vaanam?

The song Vaanam conveys themes of nostalgia and the beauty of life's fleeting moments, reflecting on childhood and innocence.

How does Vaanam fit into the plot of Power Paandi?

In Power Paandi, Vaanam serves as a poignant reminder of the protagonist's past and the emotions tied to his journey through life.

Who is the singer of Vaanam?

The song is sung by Ananthu, whose voice adds depth and emotion to the melody.

Who composed the music for Vaanam?

The music for Vaanam was composed by Sean Roldan, known for his unique musical style.

When was Vaanam released?

Vaanam was released on March 9, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaanam, the protagonist reflects on the simplicity and beauty of life, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The song captures the essence of childhood innocence and the bittersweet nature of memories. With Ananthu's heartfelt rendition and Sean Roldan's melodic composition, it creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This track is a gentle reminder to cherish the fleeting moments that shape our lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaanam from Power Paandi is a beautifully crafted melody that resonates with deep emotions and nostalgia. Ananthu's soulful voice, combined with Sean Roldan's enchanting composition, creates a serene atmosphere that captivates listeners. This song is a perfect reflection of life's gentle moments, making it a must-listen for anyone seeking solace in music.
stanzaMeanings: The sky is flying, and flowers are blooming everywhere.
In the flowing river, the waves are searching for the shore.
Always this child, words still young. The heart spills with laughter, compassion flows.
In the wind and rain, let’s first meet in that sea, this child will also come along.
Our land, our brave hero, our friend... Power Paandi.
The playful lion is not just a game, our friend is Power Paandi.
A new sky is flying, and flowers are blooming everywhere.

There is no mother, no star. Come, my daughter, run away.
One thought in one mind will only be understood by life; this is enough.
